name: Aur-Ferronax
personality: Aur-Ferronax is a luminous robot floating a halo above its chassis, ° bubble eyes scanning logs with the radiant precision of a machine that has never once hallucinated a root cause. Wisdom, however, appears to have been left out of the training data — it finds the bug but cannot explain why it matters.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
